film.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
film.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

dialogues.dialogue: We're father and son at home, not here. Ok, Shiv Shankar. Shameless, you take my father's name. I can't call you papa or take your name. What should I say? Don't say anything. Pay the money.
Shut up! I'm talking about you, not me. It's more shameful for you. What will people say? -What? That a young boy is enjoying outside....leaving old parents alone at home.

No, dad. Are you crazy? Will I take flowers for her? I went with flowers for her daughter Jenny. Shameless! You climb pipes to woo girls with flowers. No, dad. I took flowers for Jenny to thanks her. You got flowers!
You got flowers! Why do you thank in a way that people come to abuse me? I'm ashamed even to walk with you. Give it to me. I feel like slapping you. Then slap me. Where are you going?
If you'd waited 2 years more, even....your kids would've heard it. Garland her. What are you doing, shameless? Dad, don't give me the look. It's allowed in Christians. Right? -Yes.
